questions: How do I protect myself from identity theft?
What are signs of identity theft?
answers: Identity theft occurs when someone steals your personal information — like your name, NID, bank details — and uses it to commit fraud or other crimes.
Identity theft holo keu tomar personal info churi kore — naam, NID, bank account — ar seta diye fraud korey.
Protect yourself by shredding sensitive documents, using strong passwords, monitoring bank statements, not sharing personal info on unsecured sites, and checking your credit report regularly.
Warning signs include unfamiliar charges on your accounts, bills for services you didn't order, calls from debt collectors about unknown debts, and rejected tax returns.
